title: Section 361
content: 1[A Judicial Magistrate of the first class] specially empowered in this behalf by the Central Government and a 2[Metropolitan Magistrate] shall have jurisdiction to make formal investigation into shipping casualties under this Part.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 12 of 1983, s. 17 and the Schedule, for "A magistrate of the first class" (w.e.f. 18-5-1983). 2. Subs. by s. 17 and the Schedule, ibid., for "presidency magistrate" (w.e.f. 18-5-1983).
